title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explains how complex logarithms and conformal maps from complex analysis can be used to understand M.C. Escher's Print Gallery through image transformation. The video demonstrates mathematical concepts by showing how logarithmic transformations of the complex plane reveal underlying structure in recursive art.
